variables.notes: Manually changed. Relative to the selected XSGA reference bucket ('Selling, General & Administrative Expenses', 'Personnel expenses', 'Other operating expenses', stock-based comp in SG&A, and R&D), the D&A summary rows appear as separate same-level operating expense lines above operating loss, not as sub-components nested within those selected rows. Both summary labels are included because they appear to be alternate row labels across years, while individual component rows are excluded to avoid double counting.
